title: Glint Colors
description: This Pack Adds Different Colors To Glint!
body: # Glint Colors *Shiny...* [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bare-bones-better-beaves) [![Organization](https://img.shields.io/badge/Organization-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=black)](https://modrinth.com/organization/cre8to-team) [![Feedback](https://img.shields.io/badge/feedback%20form%20(no%20login)-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=googleforms&color=indigo)](https://forms.gle/fkgMp6YroGjwH8Nr5) [![Donate@CupOfCoffee](https://img.shields.io/badge/donate%20a%20cup%20of%20coffee-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=patreon&color=black)](https://patreon.com/cre8to) ## SUMMARY This pack adds different glint colors. Made for those who wish to have his fav color as glint. ## HOW TO USE | Go to "%appdata%" Extract in: | .minecraft\resourcepacks Choose color: | .minecraft\resoucepacks\Glint Colors - 1.21 - 0.1\Other Colors Copy your color then paste in: | .minecraft\resorcepack ## OTHER [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1079395737479159869?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Official%20Discord&color=white)](https://discord.com/invite/rK5RbYS9Bm) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Code-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&label=Official%20Repo&color=skyblue)](https://github.com/Creatomat/Better-Animations) [![YouTube Channel Subscribers](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UC0c_GJTYB5CW-WE_LSsKFYg?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&label=Creatomat%20Gaming&color=red)](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC0c_GJTYB5CW-WE_LSsKFYg)
